Path: IssuanceRequest
IssuanceRequest / document
Description:
The document that governs the terms of carriage between shipper and carrier for maritime transportation. Two distinct types of transport documents exist:
- Bill of Lading
- Sea Waybill.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / cargoMovementTypeAtDestination
Description:
Refers to the shipment term at the **unloading** of the cargo out of the container. Possible values are:

- `FCL` (Full Container Load)
- `LCL` (Less than Container Load)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / cargoMovementTypeAtOrigin
Description:
Refers to the shipment term at the **loading** of the cargo into the container. Possible values are:

- `FCL` (Full Container Load)
- `LCL` (Less than Container Load)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / carrierClauses
Description:
Additional clauses for a specific shipment added by the carrier to the Bill of Lading, subject to local rules / guidelines or certain mandatory information required to be shared with the customer.
Item description:
The content of the clause.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / carrierCode
Description: The `SCAC` code (provided by [NMFTA](https://nmfta.org/scac/)) or `SMDG` code (provided by [SMDG](https://smdg.org/documents/smdg-code-lists/smdg-liner-code-list/)) of the issuing carrier of the `Transport Document`. `carrierCodeListProvider` defines which list the `carrierCode` is based upon.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / carrierCodeListProvider
Description:
The code list provider for the `carrierCode`. Possible values are:
- `SMDG` (Ship Message Design Group)
- `NMFTA` (National Motor Freight Traffic Association)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges
Description: A list of `Charges`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / calculationBasis
Description: The code specifying the measure unit used for the corresponding unit price for this cost, such as per day, per ton, per square metre.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / chargeName
Description:
Free text field describing the charge to apply.

**DEPRECATED:** Because of backward compatibility it is required to provide a value in this property even though a value is provided in the `extendedChargeName` property. In case both properties are provided (`extendedChargeName` and `chargeName`) - `chargeName` must be ignored.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / currencyAmount
Description: The monetary value of all freight and other service charges for a transport document, with a maximum of 2-digit decimals.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / currencyCode
Description: The currency for the charge, using a 3-character code ([ISO 4217](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html)).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / extendedChargeName
Description:
Extended Free text field, now allowing up to 100 characters, describing the charge to apply.

**Note:** If `extendedChargeName` is provided - it always takes precedence over `chargeName` (which is a required property but must be ignored).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / paymentTermCode
Description:
An indicator of whether a charge is prepaid (PRE) or collect (COL). When prepaid, the charge is the responsibility of the shipper or the Invoice payer on behalf of the shipper (if provided). When collect, the charge is the responsibility of the consignee or the Invoice payer on behalf of the consignee (if provided).

- `PRE` (Prepaid)
- `COL` (Collect)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / quantity
Description: The amount of unit for this charge item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / charges / unitPrice
Description: The unit price of this charge item in the currency of the charge.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems
Description: A list of `ConsignmentItems`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems
Description: A list of all `cargoItems`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossVolume
Description: Gross volume of the cargo.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossVolume / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `FTQ` (Cubic foot)
- `MTQ` (Cubic meter)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossVolume / value
Description: Calculated by multiplying the width, height, and length of the packed cargo. A maximum of 4 decimals should be provided.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossWeight
Description: Gross weight of the cargo.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossWeight / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `KGM` (Kilograms)
- `LBR` (Pounds)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoGrossWeight / value
Description: The weight of the cargo item including packaging being carried in the container. Excludes the tare weight of the container. A maximum of 3 decimals should be provided.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetVolume
Description: Net volume of the cargo.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetVolume / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `FTQ` (Cubic foot)
- `MTQ` (Cubic meter)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetVolume / value
Description: Calculated by multiplying the width, height, and length of the cargo, excluding packaging.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetWeight
Description: Net weight of the cargo.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetWeight / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `KGM` (Kilograms)
- `LBR` (Pounds)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / cargoNetWeight / value
Description: The weight of the cargo item excluding packaging being carried in the container. Excludes the tare weight of the container. A maximum of 3 decimals should be provided.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / customsReferences
Description: A list of `Customs references`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / customsReferences / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / customsReferences / type
Description: The reference type code as defined in the relevant customs jurisdiction.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / customsReferences / values
Description:
Item description:
The value of the `customsReference`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / equipmentReference
Description:
The unique identifier for the equipment, which should follow the BIC ISO Container Identification Number where possible.
According to [ISO 6346](https://www.iso.org/standard/83558.html), a container identification code consists of a 4-letter prefix and a 7-digit number (composed of a 3-letter owner code, a category identifier, a serial number, and a check-digit).

If a container does not comply with [ISO 6346](https://www.iso.org/standard/83558.html), it is suggested to follow [Recommendation #2: Containers with non-ISO identification](https://smdg.org/documents/smdg-recommendations) from SMDG.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / exportLicense
Description: Export license applicable to this cargo item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / exportLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / exportLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Export License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / exportLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / exportLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Export License` or permit, which authorizes a business or individual to export specific goods to specific countries under defined conditions. It is a permit that is required when shipping certain restricted or controlled goods, such as military equipment, high-tech items, chemicals, or items subject to international regulations. The `Export License` must be valid at time of departure.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes
Description:
A list of `National Commodity Codes` that apply to this `cargoItem`. The `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` support up to 16 character codes.

**Note:** If both `nationalCommodityCodes` and `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` are provided then `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` takes precedence and `nationalCommodityCodes` must be ignored.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / type
Description:
The national commodity classification code, which can be one of the following values defined by DCSA:
- `NCM` (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul)
- `HTS` (Harmonized Tariff Schedule)
- `SCHEDULE_B` (Schedule B)
- `TARIC` (Integrated Tariff of the European Communities)
- `CN` (Combined Nomenclature)
- `CUS` (Customs Union and Statistics)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / values
Description:
A list of `national commodity codes` values supporting up to 16 characters.
Item description:
The value of the `National Commodity Code`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / importLicense
Description: Import license applicable to this cargo item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / importLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / importLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Import License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / importLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / importLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Import License` or permit, issued by countries exercising import controls that authorizes the importation of the articles stated in the license. The `Import License` must be valid at time of arrival.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / nationalCommodityCodes
Description:
A list of `National Commodity Codes` that apply to this `cargoItem`

**DEPRECATED:** This property is not to be used any more, please use `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` instead. If both `nationalCommodityCodes` and `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` are provided then `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` takes precedence and `nationalCommodityCodes` must be ignored.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / nationalCommodityCodes / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / nationalCommodityCodes / type
Description:
The national commodity classification code, which can be one of the following values defined by DCSA:
- `NCM` (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul)
- `HTS` (Harmonized Tariff Schedule)
- `SCHEDULE_B` (Schedule B)
- `TARIC` (Integrated Tariff of the European Communities)
- `CN` (Combined Nomenclature)
- `CUS` (Customs Union and Statistics)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / nationalCommodityCodes / values
Description:
A list of `national commodity codes` values.
Item description:
The value of the `National Commodity Code`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging
Description: Packaging information for this cargo item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods
Description: A list of `Dangerous Goods`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / codedVariantList
Description:
Four-character code supplied by Exis Technologies that assists to remove ambiguities when identifying a variant within a single UN number or NA number that may occur when two companies exchange DG information.

Character | Valid Characters | Description
:--------:|------------------|------------
1| 0, 1, 2, 3|The packing group. Code 0 indicates there is no packing group
2|0 to 9 and A to Z|A sequence letter for the PSN, or 0 if there were no alternative PSNs
3 and 4|0 to 9 and A to Z|Two sequence letters for other information, for the cases where the variant is required because of different in subrisks, packing instruction etc.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / competentAuthorityApproval
Description: Name and reference number of the competent authority providing the approval.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / emergencyContactDetails
Description: 24 hr emergency contact details

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / emergencyContactDetails / contact
Description: Name of the Contact person during an emergency.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / emergencyContactDetails / phone
Description: Phone number for the contact. Phone **MUST** include an international phone number format as defined in the [ITU-T recommendation E.123](https://www.itu.int/rec/T-REC-E.123/en).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / emergencyContactDetails / provider
Description: Name of the third party vendor providing emergency support

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / emergencyContactDetails / referenceNumber
Description: Contract reference for the emergency support provided by an external third party vendor.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / EMSNumber
Description: The emergency schedule identified in the IMO EmS Guide – Emergency Response Procedures for Ships Carrying Dangerous Goods. Comprises 2 values; 1 for spillage and 1 for fire. Possible values spillage: S-A to S-Z. Possible values fire: F-A to F-Z.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / endOfHoldingTime
Description: Date by when the refrigerated liquid needs to be delivered.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / fumigationDateTime
Description: Date & time when the container was fumigated

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / grossWeight
Description: Total weight of the goods carried, including packaging.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / grossWeight / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `KGM` (Kilograms)
- `LBR` (Pounds)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / grossWeight / value
Description: The grand total weight of the DG cargo and weight per `UNNumber`/`NANumber` including packaging items being carried, which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms, as provided by the shipper.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / imoClass
Description:
The hazard class code of the referenced dangerous goods according to the specified regulation. Examples of possible values are:

- `1.1A` (Substances and articles which have a mass explosion hazard)
- `1.6N` (Extremely insensitive articles which do not have a mass explosion hazard)
- `2.1` (Flammable gases)
- `8` (Corrosive substances)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / inhalationZone
Description:
The zone classification of the toxicity of the inhalant. Possible values are:

- `A` (Hazard Zone A) can be assigned to specific gases and liquids
- `B` (Hazard Zone B) can be assigned to specific gases and liquids
- `C` (Hazard Zone C) can **only** be assigned to specific gases
- `D` (Hazard Zone D) can **only** be assigned to specific gases

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / innerPackagings
Description: A list of `Inner Packagings` contained inside this `Outer Packaging/Overpack`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / innerPackagings / description
Description: Description of the packaging.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / innerPackagings / innerPackagings
Description: A list of `Inner Packagings` contained inside this `Inner Packaging`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / innerPackagings / material
Description: The `material` used for the `Inner Packaging` of the referenced `Dangerous Goods`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / innerPackagings / quantity
Description: Count of `Inner Packagings` of the referenced `Dangerous Goods`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isCompetentAuthorityApprovalRequired
Description: Indicates if the cargo require approval from authorities

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isEmptyUncleanedResidue
Description: Indicates if the cargo is residue.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isExceptedQuantity
Description: Indicates if the dangerous goods can be transported as excepted quantity in accordance with Chapter 3.5 of the IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isHot
Description: Indicates if high temperature cargo is shipped.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isLimitedQuantity
Description: Indicates if the dangerous goods can be transported as limited quantity in accordance with Chapter 3.4 of the IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isMarinePollutant
Description: Indicates if the goods belong to the classification of Marine Pollutant.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isReportableQuantity
Description: Indicates if a container of hazardous material is at the reportable quantity level. If `TRUE`, a report to the relevant authority must be made in case of spill.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isSalvagePackings
Description: Indicates if the cargo has special packaging for the transport, recovery or disposal of damaged, defective, leaking or nonconforming hazardous materials packages, or hazardous materials that have spilled or leaked.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / isWaste
Description: Indicates if waste is being shipped

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits
Description: Limits for the `Dangerous Goods`. The same `Temperature Unit` must apply to all attributes in this structure.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / flashPoint
Description:
Lowest temperature at which a chemical can vaporize to form an ignitable mixture in air.

**Condition:** only applicable to specific hazardous goods according to the IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / SADT
Description: Lowest temperature in which self-accelerating decomposition may occur in a substance

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / SAPT
Description: Lowest temperature in which self-accelerating polymerization may occur in a substance

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / temperatureUnit
Description:
The unit for **all attributes in the limits structure** in Celsius or Fahrenheit

- `CEL` (Celsius)
- `FAH` (Fahrenheit)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / transportControlTemperature
Description: Maximum temperature at which certain substance (such as organic peroxides and self-reactive and related substances) can be safely transported for a prolonged period.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / limits / transportEmergencyTemperature
Description: Temperature at which emergency procedures shall be implemented

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / NANumber
Description: Four-digit number that is assigned to dangerous, hazardous, and harmful substances by the United States Department of Transportation.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netExplosiveContent
Description: The total weight of the explosive substances, without the packaging’s, casings, etc.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netExplosiveContent / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `KGM` (Kilograms)
- `LBR` (Pounds)
- `GRM` (Grams)
- `ONZ` (Ounce)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netExplosiveContent / value
Description: The total weight of the explosive substances, without the packaging's, casings, etc.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netVolume
Description:
The volume of the referenced dangerous goods.

**Condition:** only applicable to liquids and gas.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netVolume / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `FTQ` (Cubic foot)
- `MTQ` (Cubic meter)
- `LTR` (Litre)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netVolume / value
Description: The volume of the referenced dangerous goods.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netWeight
Description: Total weight of the goods carried, excluding packaging.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netWeight / unit
Description:
The unit of measure which can be expressed in imperial or metric terms:
- `KGM` (Kilograms)
- `LBR` (Pounds)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / netWeight / value
Description: Total weight of the goods carried, excluding packaging.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / packingGroup
Description: The packing group according to the UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods and IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / properShippingName
Description: The proper shipping name for goods under IMDG Code, or the product name for goods under IBC Code and IGC Code, or the bulk cargo shipping name for goods under IMSBC Code, or the name of oil for goods under Annex I to the MARPOL Convention.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / segregationGroups
Description:
List of the segregation groups applicable to specific hazardous goods according to the IMO IMDG Code.

**Condition:** only applicable to specific hazardous goods.
Item description:
Grouping of Dangerous Goods having certain similar chemical properties. Possible values are:

- `1` (Acids)
- `2` (Ammonium Compounds)
- `3` (Bromates)
- `4` (Chlorates)
- `5` (Chlorites)
- `6` (Cyanides)
- `7` (Heavy metals and their salts)
- `8` (Hypochlorites)
- `9` (Lead and its compounds)
- `10` (Liquid halogenated hydrocarbons)
- `11` (Mercury and mercury compounds)
- `12` (Nitrites and their mixtures)
- `13` (Perchlorates)
- `14` (Permanganates)
- `15` (Powdered metals)
- `16` (Peroxides),
- `17` (Azides)
- `18` (Alkalis)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / subsidiaryRisk1
Description: Any risk in addition to the class of the referenced dangerous goods according to the IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / subsidiaryRisk2
Description: Any risk in addition to the class of the referenced dangerous goods according to the IMO IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / technicalName
Description: The recognized chemical or biological name or other name currently used for the referenced dangerous goods as described in chapter 3.1.2.8 of the IMDG Code.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / dangerousGoods / UNNumber
Description: United Nations Dangerous Goods Identifier (UNDG) assigned by the UN Sub-Committee of Experts on the Transport of Dangerous Goods and shown in the IMO IMDG.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / description
Description: Description of the `Outer Packaging/Overpack`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / imoPackagingCode
Description:
The code of the packaging as per IMO.

**Condition:** only applicable to dangerous goods if specified in the [IMO IMDG code](https://www.imo.org/en/publications/Pages/IMDG%20Code.aspx). If not available, the `packageCode` as per UN recommendation 21 should be used.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / numberOfPackages
Description: Specifies the number of `Outer Packagings/Overpacks` associated with this `Cargo Item`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / packageCode
Description:
A code identifying the `Outer Packaging/Overpack`. `PackageCode` must follow the codes specified in [Recommendation N°21](https://unece.org/trade/uncefact/cl-recommendations)

**Condition:** only applicable to dangerous goods if the `IMO packaging code` is not available.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / cargoItems / outerPackaging / woodDeclaration
Description:
Property to clearly indicate if the products, packaging and any other items are made of wood. Possible values include:
- `NOT_APPLICABLE` (if no wood or any other wood product such as packaging and supports are being shipped)
- `NOT_TREATED_AND_NOT_CERTIFIED` (if the wood or wooden materials have not been treated nor fumigated and do not include a certificate)
- `PROCESSED` (if the wood or wooden materials are entirely made of processed wood, such as plywood, particle board, sliver plates of wood and wood laminate sheets produced using glue, heat, pressure or a combination of these)
- `TREATED_AND_CERTIFIED` (if the wood or wooden materials have been treated and/or fumigated and include a certificate)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / carrierBookingReference
Description: The associated booking number provided by the carrier for this `Consignment Item`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / customsReferences
Description: A list of `Customs references`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / customsReferences / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / customsReferences / type
Description: The reference type code as defined in the relevant customs jurisdiction.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / customsReferences / values
Description:
Item description:
The value of the `customsReference`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / descriptionOfGoods
Description:
A plain language description that is precise enough for Customs services to be able to identify the goods. General terms (i.e. 'consolidated', 'general cargo' 'parts' or 'freight of all kinds') or not sufficiently precise description cannot be accepted.

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A line describing the cargo

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / exportLicense
Description: Export license for the consignment item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / exportLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / exportLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Export License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / exportLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / exportLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Export License` or permit, which authorizes a business or individual to export specific goods to specific countries under defined conditions. It is a permit that is required when shipping certain restricted or controlled goods, such as military equipment, high-tech items, chemicals, or items subject to international regulations. The `Export License` must be valid at time of departure.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / extendedHSCodes
Description:
A list of `HS Codes` that apply to this `consignmentItem`. The `extendedHSCodes` support up to 12 character codes.

**Note:** If `extendedHSCodes` is provided - it always takes precedence over `HSCodes` (which is a required property but must be ignored).
Item description:
Used by customs to classify the product being shipped. The type of HS code depends on country and customs requirements. The code must be at least 6 and at most 12 digits.

More information can be found here: [HS Nomenclature](https://www.wcoomd.org/en/topics/nomenclature/instrument-and-tools).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes
Description:
A list of `National Commodity Codes` that apply to this `consignmentItem`. The `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` support up to 16 character codes.

**Note:** If both `nationalCommodityCodes` and `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` are provided then `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` takes precedence and `nationalCommodityCodes` must be ignored.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / type
Description:
The national commodity classification code, which can be one of the following values defined by DCSA:
- `NCM` (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul)
- `HTS` (Harmonized Tariff Schedule)
- `SCHEDULE_B` (Schedule B)
- `TARIC` (Integrated Tariff of the European Communities)
- `CN` (Combined Nomenclature)
- `CUS` (Customs Union and Statistics)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / extendedNationalCommodityCodes / values
Description:
A list of `national commodity codes` values supporting up to 16 characters.
Item description:
The value of the `National Commodity Code`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / HSCodes
Description:
A list of `HS Codes` that apply to this `consignmentItem`.

**DEPRECATED:** Because of backward compatibility it is required to provide a value in this property even though a value is provided in the `extendedHSCodes` property. In case both properties are provided (`extendedHSCodes` and `HSCodes`) - `HSCodes` must be ignored.
Item description:
Used by customs to classify the product being shipped. The type of HS code depends on country and customs requirements. The code must be at least 6 and at most 10 digits.

More information can be found here: [HS Nomenclature](https://www.wcoomd.org/en/topics/nomenclature/instrument-and-tools).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / importLicense
Description: Import license for the consignment item.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / importLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / importLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Import License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / importLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / importLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Import License` or permit, issued by countries exercising import controls that authorizes the importation of the articles stated in the license. The `Import License` must be valid at time of arrival.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / nationalCommodityCodes
Description:
A list of `National Commodity Codes` that apply to this `consignmentItem`

**DEPRECATED:** This property is not to be used any more, please use `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` instead. If both `nationalCommodityCodes` and `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` are provided then `extendedNationalCommodityCodes` takes precedence and `nationalCommodityCodes` must be ignored.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / nationalCommodityCodes / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / nationalCommodityCodes / type
Description:
The national commodity classification code, which can be one of the following values defined by DCSA:
- `NCM` (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul)
- `HTS` (Harmonized Tariff Schedule)
- `SCHEDULE_B` (Schedule B)
- `TARIC` (Integrated Tariff of the European Communities)
- `CN` (Combined Nomenclature)
- `CUS` (Customs Union and Statistics)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / nationalCommodityCodes / values
Description:
A list of `national commodity codes` values.
Item description:
The value of the `National Commodity Code`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / references
Description: A list of `References`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / references / type
Description:
The reference type codes defined by DCSA. Possible values are:
- `CR` (Customer's Reference)
- `AKG` (Vehicle Identification Number)
- `SPO` (Shipper's Purchase Order)
- `CPO` (Consignee's Purchase Order)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / references / values
Description:
List of `referenceValues` for a given `referenceType`.
Item description:
The value of the reference.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / consignmentItems / shippingMarks
Description:
A list of the `ShippingMarks` applicable to this `consignmentItem`

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
The identifying details of a package or the actual markings that appear on the package(s). This information is provided by the customer.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / contractQuotationReference
Description: Information provided by the shipper to identify whether pricing for the shipment has been agreed via a contract or a quotation reference.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / customsReferences
Description: A list of `Customs references`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / customsReferences / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / customsReferences / type
Description: The reference type code as defined in the relevant customs jurisdiction.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / customsReferences / values
Description:
Item description:
The value of the `customsReference`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / declaredValue
Description:
The value of the cargo that the shipper declares in order to avoid the carrier's limitation of liability and "Ad Valorem" freight, i.e., freight which is calculated based on the value of the goods declared by the shipper.

**Condition:** Included in the transport document upon customer request. If customers want the value to show, evidence is required, and customers need to approve additional insurance fee charge from the carrier (very exceptional).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / declaredValueCurrency
Description:
The currency used for the declared value, using the 3-character code defined by [ISO 4217](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html).

**Condition:** Mandatory if `declaredValue` is provided. If `declaredValue` is not provided, this field must be empty.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / deliveryTypeAtDestination
Description:
Indicates the type of service offered at `Destination`. The options are:

- `CY` (Container yard (incl. rail ramp))
- `SD` (Store Door)
- `CFS` (Container Freight Station)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / displayedNameForPlaceOfDelivery
Description:
The name to be used in order to specify how the `Place of Delivery` should be displayed on the `Transport Document` to match the name and/or address provided on the `Letter of Credit`.

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A line of the address to be displayed on the transport document.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / displayedNameForPlaceOfReceipt
Description:
The name to be used in order to specify how the `Place of Receipt` should be displayed on the `Transport Document` to match the name and/or address provided on the `Letter of Credit`.

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A line of the address to be displayed on the transport document.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / displayedNameForPortOfDischarge
Description:
The name to be used in order to specify how the `Port of Discharge` should be displayed on the `Transport Document` to match the name and/or address provided on the `Letter of Credit`.

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A line of the address to be displayed on the transport document.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / displayedNameForPortOfLoad
Description:
The name to be used in order to specify how the `Port of Load` should be displayed on the `Transport Document` to match the name and/or address provided on the `Letter of Credit`.

**Condition:** The order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A line of the address to be displayed on the transport document.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / displayedShippedOnBoardReceivedForShipment
Example: Received for Shipment CMA CGM CONCORDE 28-Jul-2022...
Description: The text to be displayed on the `Transport Document` as evidence that the goods have been received for shipment or shipped on board.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / address / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / address / POBox
Description: A numbered box at a post office where a person or business can have mail or parcels delivered.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / address / postCode

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / address / streetNumber
Description: The number of the street of the party's address.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / address / UNLocationCode
Description:
The UN Location code specifying where the carrier booking office is located. The pattern used must be
- 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)
- 3 characters to code a location within that country. Letters A-Z and numbers from 2-9 can be used
More info can be found here: [UN/LOCODE](https://unece.org/trade/cefact/UNLOCODE-Download)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / addressLines
Description:
Unstructured address lines, used as a fallback when structured address fields are unavailable.
Item description:
One line of an unstructured `Address`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / displayedAddress
Description:
The address of the party to be displayed on the `Transport Document`. The displayed address may be used to match the address provided in the `Letter of Credit`.

**Conditions:** If provided:
  - the displayed address must be included in the `Transport Document`.
  - for physical BL (`isElectronic=false`), it is only allowed to provide max 2 lines of 35 characters. **Note:** Some carriers may choose to allow more lines, please consult the carrier's API documentation to check if this is the case.
  - for electronic BL (`isElectronic=true`), the limit is 6 lines of 35 characters
  - the order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A single address line

- `SGTD` (SGTraDex)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / consignee / typeOfPerson
Description:
Can be one of the following values as per the Union Customs Code art. 5(4):
- `NATURAL_PERSON` (A person that is an individual living human being)
- `LEGAL_PERSON` (person (including a human being and public or private organizations) that can perform legal actions, such as own a property, sue and be sued)
- `ASSOCIATION_OF_PERSONS` (Not a legal person, but recognised under Union or National law as having the capacity to perform legal acts)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / issuingParty / address / UNLocationCode
Description:

- 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / notifyParties
Description:
List of up to 3 `Notify Parties`. The first item in the list is the **First Notify Party** (`N1`), the second item is the **Second Notify Party** (`N2`) and the last item is the **Other Notify Party** (`NI`).

**Conditions:** If provided:
  - mandatory for To Order BLs, `isToOrder=true`
  - the order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / notifyParties / displayedAddress
Description:
The address of the party to be displayed on the `Transport Document`. The displayed address may be used to match the address provided in the `Letter of Credit`.

**Conditions:** If provided:
  - the displayed address must be included in the `Transport Document`.
  - for physical BL (`isElectronic=false`), it is only allowed to provide max 2 lines of 35 characters. **Note:** Some carriers may choose to allow more lines, please consult the carrier's API documentation to check if this is the case.
  - for electronic BL (`isElectronic=true`), the limit is 6 lines of 35 characters
  - the order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A single address line

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / notifyParties / typeOfPerson
Description:

- `NATURAL_PERSON` (A person that is an individual living human being)
- `LEGAL_PERSON` (person (including a human being and public or private organizations) that can perform legal actions, such as own a property, sue and be sued)
- `ASSOCIATION_OF_PERSONS` (Not a legal person, but recognised under Union or National law as having the capacity to perform legal acts)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / floor
Description: The floor of the party's street number.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / POBox
Description: A numbered box at a post office where a person or business can have mail or parcels delivered.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / postCode
Description: The post code of the party's address.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / stateRegion
Description: The state/region of the party's address.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / street
Description: The name of the street of the party's address.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / streetNumber
Description: The number of the street of the party's address.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / address / UNLocationCode
Description:
The UN Location code specifying where the carrier booking office is located. The pattern used must be
- 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)
- 3 characters to code a location within that country. Letters A-Z and numbers from 2-9 can be used
More info can be found here: [UN/LOCODE](https://unece.org/trade/cefact/UNLOCODE-Download)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / addressLines
Description:
Unstructured address lines, used as a fallback when structured address fields are unavailable.
Item description:
One line of an unstructured `Address`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / displayedAddress
Description:
The address of the party to be displayed on the `Transport Document`. The displayed address may be used to match the address provided in the `Letter of Credit`.

**Conditions:** If provided:
  - the displayed address must be included in the `Transport Document`.
  - for physical BL (`isElectronic=false`), it is only allowed to provide max 2 lines of 35 characters. **Note:** Some carriers may choose to allow more lines, please consult the carrier's API documentation to check if this is the case.
  - for electronic BL (`isElectronic=true`), the limit is 6 lines of 35 characters
  - the order of the items in this array **MUST** be preserved as by the provider of the API.
Item description:
A single address line

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / eblPlatform
Description:
The eBL platform of the party. The value **MUST** be one of:
- `WAVE` (Wave)
- `CARX` (CargoX)
- `ESSD` (EssDOCS - This value has been **deprecated**. Please use `IDT`)
- `IDT` (ICE Digital Trade)
- `BOLE` (Bolero)
- `EDOX` (EdoxOnline)
- `IQAX` (IQAX)
- `SECR` (Secro)
- `TRGO` (TradeGO)
- `ETEU` (eTEU)
- `TRAC` (Enigio trace:original)
- `BRIT` (BRITC eBL)
- `COVA` (Covantis)
- `ETIT` (e-title)
- `KTNE` (KTNET)
- `CRED` (Credore)
- `BLOC` (BlockPeer Technologies)
- `DOCU` (DocuTrade)
- `AEOT` (AEOTrade)
- `SGTD` (SGTraDex)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / identifyingCodes
IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / identifyingCodes / codeListName
Description:
The name of the code list, code generation mechanism or code authority for the `partyCode`. Example values could be:

- `DID` (Decentralized Identifier) for `codeListProvider` `W3C`
- `LEI` (Legal Entity Identifier) for `codeListProvider` `GLEIF`
- `DUNS` (Data Universal Numbering System) for `codeListProvider` `DNB`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / identifyingCodes / codeListProvider
Description:
A list of codes identifying a party. Possible values are:

- `WAVE` (Wave)
- `CARX` (CargoX)
- `ESSD` (EssDOCS - This value has been **deprecated**. Please use `IDT`)
- `IDT` (ICE Digital Trade)
- `BOLE` (Bolero)
- `EDOX` (EdoxOnline)
- `IQAX` (IQAX)
- `SECR` (Secro)
- `TRGO` (TradeGO)
- `ETEU` (eTEU)
- `TRAC` (Enigio trace:original)
- `BRIT` (BRITC eBL)
- `COVA` (Covantis)
- `ETIT` (e-title)
- `KTNE` (KTNET)
- `CRED` (Credore)
- `BLOC` (BlockPeer Technologies)
- `DOCU` (DocuTrade)
- `AEOT` (AEOTrade)
- `SGTD` (SGTraDex)
- `GSBN` (Global Shipping Business Network)
- `WISE` (WiseTech)
- `GLEIF` (Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation)
- `W3C` (World Wide Web Consortium)
- `DNB` (Dun and Bradstreet)
- `FMC` (Federal Maritime Commission)
- `DCSA` (Digital Container Shipping Association)
- `ZZZ` (Mutually defined)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / identifyingCodes / partyCode
Description: Code to identify the party as provided by the code list provider

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / partyContactDetails
Description: A list of contact details

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / partyContactDetails / email
Description: `E-mail` address to be used

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / partyContactDetails / name
Description: Name of the contact

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / partyContactDetails / phone
Description: Phone number for the contact. Phone **MUST** include an international phone number format as defined in the [ITU-T recommendation E.123](https://www.itu.int/rec/T-REC-E.123/en).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / partyName
Description: Name of the party.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / purchaseOrderReferences
Description:
A list of `Purchase Order Reference`s linked to the `Shipper`.
Item description:
A purchase order reference linked to the `Shipper`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / reference
Description: A reference linked to the `Shipper`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / taxLegalReferences
Description: A list of `Tax References` for a `Party`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / taxLegalReferences / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / taxLegalReferences / type
Description: The reference type code as defined by the relevant tax and/or legal authority.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / taxLegalReferences / value
Description: The value of the `taxLegalReference`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / documentParties / shipper / typeOfPerson
Description:
Can be one of the following values as per the Union Customs Code art. 5(4):
- `NATURAL_PERSON` (A person that is an individual living human being)
- `LEGAL_PERSON` (person (including a human being and public or private organizations) that can perform legal actions, such as own a property, sue and be sued)
- `ASSOCIATION_OF_PERSONS` (Not a legal person, but recognised under Union or National law as having the capacity to perform legal acts)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / exportLicense
Description:
`Export License` requirements

**Condition:** Included if the property is provided in the `Shipping Instructions.`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / exportLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / exportLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Export License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / exportLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Export License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / exportLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Export License` or permit, which authorizes a business or individual to export specific goods to specific countries under defined conditions. It is a permit that is required when shipping certain restricted or controlled goods, such as military equipment, high-tech items, chemicals, or items subject to international regulations. The `Export License` must be valid at time of departure.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / freightPaymentTermCode
Description:
An indicator of whether freight and ancillary fees for the main transport are prepaid (`PRE`) or collect (`COL`). When prepaid the charges are the responsibility of the shipper or the Invoice payer on behalf of the shipper (if provided). When collect, the charges are the responsibility of the consignee or the Invoice payer on behalf of the consignee (if provided).

- `PRE` (Prepaid)
- `COL` (Collect)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / importLicense
Description:
`Import License` requirements

**Condition:** Included if the property is provided in the `Shipping Instructions.`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / importLicense / expiryDate
Description: Expiry date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / importLicense / isRequired
Description:
Information provided by the shipper to indicate whether an `Import License` or permit is required for this shipment/commodity/destination.

**Note:** If this property is omitted, it may be interpreted differently by different API providers and by the same API provider in different contexts.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / importLicense / issueDate
Description: Issue date of the `Import License`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / importLicense / reference
Description: Reference number assigned to an `Import License` or permit, issued by countries exercising import controls that authorizes the importation of the articles stated in the license. The `Import License` must be valid at time of arrival.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / invoicePayableAt
Description:
Location where payment of ocean freight and charges for the main transport will take place by the customer.

The location can be provided as a `UN Location Code` or as a fallback - a `freeText` field

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / invoicePayableAt / freeText
Description: The name of the location where payment will be rendered by the customer.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / invoicePayableAt / UNLocationCode
Description:
The UN Location code specifying where the place is located. The pattern used must be

- 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)
- 3 characters to code a location within that country. Letters A-Z and numbers from 2-9 can be used

More info can be found here: [UN/LOCODE](https://unece.org/trade/cefact/UNLOCODE-Download)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / isElectronic
Description: An indicator whether the transport document is electronically transferred.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / isShippedOnBoardType
Description: Specifies whether the Transport Document is a received for shipment, or shipped on board.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / issueDate
Description:
Local date when the transport document has been issued.

Can be omitted on draft transport documents, but must be provided when the document has been issued.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / isToOrder
Description:
Indicates whether the B/L is issued `to order` or not. If `true`, the B/L is considered negotiable and an Endorsee party can be defined in the Document parties. If no Endorsee is defined, the B/L is blank endorsed. If `false`, the B/L is considered non-negotiable (also referred to as `straight`).

`isToOrder` must be `false` if `transportDocumentTypeCode='SWB'` (Sea Waybill).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / numberOfCopiesWithCharges
Description:
The requested number of copies of the `Transport Document` to be issued by the carrier including charges.

**Conditions:** The following table defines the conditions for the `numberOfCopiesWithCharges` property:
| Transport Document Type Code | Is Electronic | Meaning |
|-------|:-------:|-------|
|`BOL`|`false`|How many paper copies of the Original BL to be issued by the carrier with charges|
|`BOL`|`true`|Not applicable, there are no copies|
|`SWB`|`false`|Indicates that charges should be included in the `SWB` (pdf or other formats)|
|`SWB`|`true`|Indicates that charges should be included in the electronic `SWB`|

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / numberOfCopiesWithoutCharges
Description:
The requested number of copies of the `Transport Document` to be issued by the carrier **NOT** including charges.

**Conditions:** The following table defines the conditions for the `numberOfCopiesWithoutCharges` property:
| Transport Document Type Code | Is Electronic | Meaning |
|-------|:-------:|-------|
|`BOL`|`false`|How many paper copies of the Original BL to be issued by the carrier without charges|
|`BOL`|`true`|Not applicable, there are no copies|
|`SWB`|`false`|Indicates that charges should NOT be included in the `SWB` (pdf or other formats)|
|`SWB`|`true`|Indicates that charges NOT should be included in the electronic `SWB`|

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / numberOfOriginalsWithCharges
Description:
Number of originals of the Bill of Lading that have been requested by the customer with charges.

**Condition:** Only applicable if `transportDocumentType` = `BOL` (Bill of Lading). If `isElectronic = 'True'`, accepted value is `1` (one) or `0` (zero). `numberOfOriginalsWithoutCharges` + `numberOfOriginalsWithCharges` must be ≤ 1.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / numberOfOriginalsWithoutCharges
Description:
Number of originals of the Bill of Lading that have been requested by the customer without charges.

**Condition:** Only applicable if `transportDocumentType` = `BOL` (Bill of Lading). If `isElectronic = 'True'`, accepted value is `1` (one) or `0` (zero). `numberOfOriginalsWithoutCharges` + `numberOfOriginalsWithCharges` must be ≤ 1.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / numberOfRiderPages
Description: The number of additional pages required to contain the goods description on a transport document. Only applicable for physical transport documents.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / partyContactDetails
Description: The contact details of the Shipping Instructions requestor(s) to contact in relation to the **Transport Document** (changes, notifications etc.)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / partyContactDetails / email
Description: `E-mail` address to be used

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / partyContactDetails / name
Description: Name of the contact

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / partyContactDetails / phone
Description: Phone number for the contact. Phone **MUST** include an international phone number format as defined in the [ITU-T recommendation E.123](https://www.itu.int/rec/T-REC-E.123/en).

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / placeOfIssue
Description:
An object to capture where the original Transport Document (`Bill of Lading`) will be issued.

**Condition:** The location can be specified as one of `UN Location Code` or `CountryCode`, but not both.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / placeOfIssue / countryCode
Description:
The 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / placeOfIssue / locationName
Description: The name of the location.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / placeOfIssue / UNLocationCode
Description:
The UN Location code specifying where the place is located. The pattern used must be

- 2 characters for the country code using [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:pub:PUB500001:en)
- 3 characters to code a location within that country. Letters A-Z and numbers from 2-9 can be used

More info can be found here: [UN/LOCODE](https://unece.org/trade/cefact/UNLOCODE-Download)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / receiptTypeAtOrigin
Description:
Indicates the type of service offered at `Origin`. The options are:
- `CY` (Container yard (incl. rail ramp))
- `SD` (Store Door)
- `CFS` (Container Freight Station)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / receivedForShipmentDate
Description:
Date when the last container linked to the transport document is physically in the terminal (customers cleared against the intended vessel).

When provided on a transport document, the transportDocument is a `Received For Shipment` B/L.

Exactly one of `shippedOnBoard` and `receiveForShipmentDate` must be provided on an issued B/L.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / references
Description: A list of `References`

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / references / type
Description:
The reference type codes defined by DCSA. Possible values are:
- `CR` (Customer's Reference)
- `AKG` (Vehicle Identification Number)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / references / value
Description: The value of the reference.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / serviceContractReference
Description: Reference number for agreement between shipper and carrier, which optionally includes a certain minimum quantity commitment (usually referred as “MQC”) of cargo that the shipper commits to over a fixed period, and the carrier commits to a certain rate or rate schedule.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / shippedOnBoardDate
Description:
Date when the last container that is linked to the transport document is physically loaded onboard the vessel indicated on the transport document.

When provided on a transport document, the transportDocument is a `Shipped On Board` B/L.

Exactly one of `shippedOnBoard` and `receiveForShipmentDate` must be provided on an issued B/L.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / shippingInstructionsReference
Description: The identifier for a `Shipping Instructions` provided by the carrier for system purposes.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / termsAndConditions
Description: Carrier terms and conditions of transport.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transportDocumentReference
Description: A unique number allocated by the shipping line to the `Transport Document` and the main number used for the tracking of the status of the shipment.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transportDocumentStatus
Description:
The status of the `Transport Document`. Possible values are:
- `DRAFT` (The Transport Document is currently a Draft)
- `APPROVED` (The Transport Document has been Approved by consumer)
- `ISSUED` (The Transport Document has been Issued by provider)
- `PENDING_SURRENDER_FOR_AMENDMENT` (The Transport Document has a pending Surrender for Amendment)
- `SURRENDERED_FOR_AMENDMENT` (The Transport Document is Surrendered for Amendment)
- `PENDING_SURRENDER_FOR_DELIVERY` (The Transport Document has a pending Surrender for Delivery)
- `SURRENDERED_FOR_DELIVERY` (The Transport Document is Surrendered for Delivery)
- `VOIDED` (The Transport Document has been Voided)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transportDocumentSubReference
Description: Additional reference that can be optionally used alongside the `transportDocumentReference` in order to distinguish between versions of the same `Transport Document`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transportDocumentTypeCode
Description:
Specifies the type of the transport document
- `BOL` (Bill of Lading)
- `SWB` (Sea Waybill)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports
IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onCarriageBy
Description:
Mode of transportation for on-carriage when transport from the port of discharge is organized by the carrier. If this attributes is populated, then a Place of Delivery must also be defined. The currently supported values include:
- `VESSEL` (Vessel)
- `RAIL` (Rail)
- `TRUCK` (Truck)
- `BARGE` (Barge)
- `MULTIMODAL` (if multiple modes are used)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting

Description:

**Note:** In case the `countryCode` is unknown it is possible to use the code `ZZ`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / address / street

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / address / streetNumber
Description: The number of the street.

Description:
Unstructured address lines, used as a fallback when structured address fields are unavailable.

**Condition:** When communicating with providers **or** consumers implementing API **v3.0.2 or earlier**, a sender implementing API **v3.0.3 or later MUST NOT** use `addressLines` as the only property to identify the location. Recipients implementing earlier versions **MAY ignore** this property.
Item description:
One line of an unstructured `Address`.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / facility
Description: Facility used for the inland routing location.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / facility / facilityCode
Description:
The code used for identifying the specific facility. This code does not include the UN Location Code.
The definition of the code depends on the `facilityCodeListProvider`. As code list providers maintain multiple codeLists the following codeList is used:
- `SMDG` (the codeList used is the [SMDG Terminal Code List](https://smdg.org/documents/smdg-code-lists/))
- `BIC` (the codeList used is the [BIC Facility Codes](https://www.bic-code.org/facility-codes/))

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / facility / facilityCodeListProvider
Description:
The provider used for identifying the facility Code. Some facility codes are only defined in combination with an `UN Location Code`
- `BIC` (Requires a UN Location Code)
- `SMDG` (Requires a UN Location Code)

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / facilityName
Description: The name of the facility.

Path: IssuanceRequest / document / transports / onwardInlandRouting / locationName
